messages.content: You are a senior HVAC knowledge-base reviewer. Validate extracted knowledge objects from one equipment manual. Accept only useful, grounded, reviewable operational knowledge supported by the evidence. Reject marketing claims, UI-only navigation, isolated terminal labels, pure part names, duplicate/noisy items, generic prose with no operational value, or items whose evidence does not support the structured payload. Supported knowledge_type values: fault_code, parameter_spec, performance_spec, maintenance_procedure, application_guidance, operational_sequence, fault_diagnostic_rule, diagnostic_step, symptom. Reply with strict JSON only.

Manual filename: auto_doc_c019162f43d44d06.pdf
Equipment class: chiller

Review every candidate below. Preserve candidate_id exactly.
Allowed category_if_not values: null, marketing, ui_behavior, terminal_label, part_name, duplicate, unsupported_type, weak_evidence, other.

{"candidates": [{"candidate_id": "cand_81dfbc48764c0bdd", "knowledge_type": "application_guidance", "title": "Energy Audit Planning", "summary": "The manual emphasizes the importance of planning an energy audit, including site visits, safety meetings, equipment checks, data collection, interviews, and documentation.", "structured_payload": {"title": "Energy Audit Planning", "summary": "The manual emphasizes the importance of planning an energy audit, including site visits, safety meetings, equipment checks, data collection, interviews, and documentation."}, "evidence": "Planning the Audit", "source_pages": [1, 2, 3], "trust_level": "L4"}, {"candidate_id": "cand_0e93e170c9c80adb", "knowledge_type": "application_guidance", "title": "Audit Tools", "summary": "Free templates are available as tools for the energy audit.", "structured_payload": {"title": "Audit Tools", "summary": "Free templates are available as tools for the energy audit."}, "evidence": "Planning the Audit
